bg-elevated.$description: Elevated background — for floating layers (modals, popovers, dropdowns). Same as bg-document in light mode; can be lightened in dark mode to convey elevation.
Elevated background (inverse) — for floating layers (modals, popovers, dropdowns). Same as bg-document in light mode; can be lightened in dark mode to convey elevation.

transparent.$description: Fully transparent - for invisible backgrounds and borders

scroll.$description: Scroll-affordance schaduw — lichte kleur voor zichtbaarheid op donkere achtergrond

accent-color.$description: Form control accent color (checkboxes, radio buttons)

outline-color.$description: Focus outline color for use on light/tinted backgrounds in dark mode - opposite of outline-color
